usage: Primary character reference for Zero-One in ep001 and future episode image generation.
visual_rules: Use this generated S02 image as the sole visual identity anchor for Zero-One.
Keep the chibi queen silhouette, pale hair, half-lidded cold expression, black-and-gold sci-fi styling, mechanical throne, mechanical tentacles, and floating crown.
Do not replace Zero-One with the older design-sheet helmet look unless a future episode explicitly changes the reference.
